---
title: "Philippe Sloksnath"
pagetitle: "Philippe Sloksnath"
description: "Research & Teaching Assistant at the University of Zurich studying AI-based persuasion, misinformation, and media effects."
---

<img src="images/philippe.jpg" class="profile" alt="Philippe Sloksnath">

I am a Research and Teaching Assistant at the
[Department of Communication and Media Research](https://www.ikmz.uzh.ch/en/research/divisions/mediapsychology-and-methods/team/philippe-sloksnath.html){target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"}
at University of Zurich. My research is situated in Communication Science, Psychology and Human–Computer Interaction, with a particular focus on AI-based persuasion, misinformation, and media effects. I care about statistical inference and transparent, reproducible research practices. Always happy to chat.


## Open Science
I value scientific integrity and strive to make my research as reliable, transparent, and reproducible as possible. Please reach out if anything is unclear, insufficiently reported, or not reproducible.
